text: Re-vendored engine bundles from vfkb commit fea3895 (vilosource/vfkb PR #76): storage.defaultProject() replaces the hard-coded 'spike' project label — derived from the brain dir (<repo>/.vfkb → repo), else $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR, else cwd; VFKB_PROJECT still wins. Plugin version 0.1.0 → 0.1.1. Verified the VENDORED copy in a sandbox: VFKB_DATA_DIR=<sandbox>/fakerepo/.vfkb renders <vfkb-resume project="fakerepo">.

Re-vendored engine bundles from vfkb v2 SHIPPED main (vilosource/vfkb@5bb087e, the v2->main ship merge PR #86) — plugin v0.2.0. Brings the v2 engine to plugin consumers: session backbone (ADR-0039, hooks read session_id from stdin), native concurrency lock (ADR-0040), schema honesty / read-boundary zod validation + refs.contradicts (ADR-0042), storage seam (ADR-0044). Note vfkb.mjs grew ~48KB->~628KB (zod now bundled into the CLI, expected post-ADR-0042). Sandbox-verified the VENDORED copies: CLI add+resume renders project=fakerepo; MCP tools/list=9. Evidence upstream: vfkb suite 199/199 on the ship head; full L4 re-pin pi 32/33 / claude 31/32 (vfkb PR #84).

v0.4.0 SHIPPED-CANDIDATE (2026-07-09): engine re-vendored from vfkb main@7c20d4d (ADR-0049 last-handoff pin, adversarial-review hardened: 2k truncation cap, total-order tie-break, constitutional dedup) + Layer 1 built here: /vfkb:brief skill (skills/brief) forking into the Haiku-pinned briefer agent (agents/briefer.md, model: haiku per official sub-agents docs). VERIFIED: vendored CLI renders ## Last handoff + MCP tools/list=9 (sandbox); /vfkb:brief verified END-TO-END via claude --plugin-dir sandboxes, wired arm named the seeded sentinel next-step exactly with all 5 template sections + graceful gh degradation, contrast arm (no handoff) reported UNKNOWN without fabricating. Unverified: that the fork actually ran on haiku (not observable from -p output; frontmatter contract doc-verified).
